reasoning: The market probability for this question on Manifold was 7% on Oct 30, 2025, a week before the knowledge cutoff date. Searches confirm that as of early November 2025, while AI capabilities continue to advance with new models, there's no consensus that AGI matching a "generally educated human" has been achieved. Leading AI figures have actually stepped back from AGI hype recently. For this to resolve YES, a Manifold user poll run at the end of 2025 must result in a YES resolution (implying a majority agree AGI exists). Given the high standards developers and forecasters maintain for the AGI milestone and the shortened timeline (less than 2 months remaining in 2025), a positive consensus in a late-2025 poll is highly unlikely. I am estimating 6%, closely tracking the market and accounting for the passage of time without an AGI breakthrough.
